nodes.name: sciona.molecular_docking.greedy_subgraph
nodes.conceptual_summary: Grouped atoms sharing an upstream family or module.
nodes.decomposition_rationale: Replaces singleton atom subpackages with a flat module layout.

nodes.name: greedy_maximum_subgraph
nodes.description: Greedily selects a source-aligned maximum-weight independent-set subgraph mask from a molecular interaction conflict graph.

inputs.name: scores
inputs.constraints: node weights aligned to adjacency rows

nodes.conceptual_summary: Greedy weighted independent-set selector. It orders molecular interaction nodes by weight divided by one plus conflict degree, then adds a node only when it has no conflict edge to the current selection.
nodes.critic_notes: Contract narrowed during remediation to match the upstream Molecular-Docking classical MIS helpers instead of claiming connected-subgraph selection.
